message:
refactor(tests): migrate export.rs from tokio::test to runtime_compat (ft-e34d9.10.2.3.1)

Convert 21 #[tokio::test] async tests to #[test] with run_async_test helper
backed by runtime_compat::RuntimeBuilder. Part of the broader tokio removal
effort — retry.rs, protocol_recovery.rs, sharding.rs, and webhook.rs were
migrated in the same batch (committed via 7652a25d).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
